pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks for ZIP_PATH at /home/ga/Documents/tor_diagnostics.zip and task.json instructions explicitly specify this path
export_result.sh extraction logic finds and validates these specific filenames
verifier.py grants points only if about_size >= 2000
verifier.py grants points only if logs_size >= 500

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on real log data generated dynamically by the Tor Browser daemon connecting to the Tor network. The required output is a zip archive at /home/ga/Documents/tor_diagnostics.zip containing about_support.txt (verified minimum size 2000 bytes), tor_logs.txt (verified minimum size 500 bytes), and bootstrap_phases.txt.
